findings.description: The knowledge file adds '確認画面JSP。W11AC0201.jspを取り込む。' as the description for W11AC0202.jsp. In the source table, the row for W11AC0202.jsp has empty cells for both Stereotype and Description — no explicit description is provided for that file. The statement is a reasonable inference from context (the W11AC0201.jsp row says 'W11AC0202.jsp内でW11AC0201.jspを取り込んでいる'), but it does not directly appear in the source and constitutes added content.
findings.source_evidence: Source table second row: `| | :download:\`W11AC0202.jsp<...>\`` | (empty) | (empty) |` — no description text is present for W11AC0202.jsp in the source.
